nws.name: Independence Day
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 1pm and 2pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2pm and 5pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 92. Heat index values as high as 95. West wind 7 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
